instruction: Five hearts in a row. Make every heart red (#e63946) EXCEPT the third one (heart-3), which must remain black (#222).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 262 96" width="262" height="96">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="262" height="96" fill="white" />
  <g id="heart-1" data-source="heroicons/outline/heart.svg" transform="translate(12, 32) scale(1.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M21 8.25c0-2.485-2.099-4.5-4.688-4.5-1.935 0-3.597 1.126-4.312 2.733-.715-1.607-2.377-2.733-4.313-2.733C5.1 3.75 3 5.765 3 8.25c0 7.22 9 12 9 12s9-4.78 9-12Z"/></g>
  <g id="heart-2" data-source="heroicons/outline/heart.svg" transform="translate(62, 32) scale(1.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M21 8.25c0-2.485-2.099-4.5-4.688-4.5-1.935 0-3.597 1.126-4.312 2.733-.715-1.607-2.377-2.733-4.313-2.733C5.1 3.75 3 5.765 3 8.25c0 7.22 9 12 9 12s9-4.78 9-12Z"/></g>
  <g id="heart-3" data-source="heroicons/outline/heart.svg" transform="translate(112, 32) scale(1.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M21 8.25c0-2.485-2.099-4.5-4.688-4.5-1.935 0-3.597 1.126-4.312 2.733-.715-1.607-2.377-2.733-4.313-2.733C5.1 3.75 3 5.765 3 8.25c0 7.22 9 12 9 12s9-4.78 9-12Z"/></g>
  <g id="heart-4" data-source="heroicons/outline/heart.svg" transform="translate(162, 32) scale(1.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M21 8.25c0-2.485-2.099-4.5-4.688-4.5-1.935 0-3.597 1.126-4.312 2.733-.715-1.607-2.377-2.733-4.313-2.733C5.1 3.75 3 5.765 3 8.25c0 7.22 9 12 9 12s9-4.78 9-12Z"/></g>
  <g id="heart-5" data-source="heroicons/outline/heart.svg" transform="translate(212, 32) scale(1.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M21 8.25c0-2.485-2.099-4.5-4.688-4.5-1.935 0-3.597 1.126-4.312 2.733-.715-1.607-2.377-2.733-4.313-2.733C5.1 3.75 3 5.765 3 8.25c0 7.22 9 12 9 12s9-4.78 9-12Z"/></g>
</svg>
